affected_pattern: Customers in multi-state regions see same usage charged twice under different jurisdictional tax lines
root_cause: Tax engine double-levy — after the rollout of the new location-resolver, cross-state customers matched both origin and destination tax jurisdictions and the tax engine applied both levies instead of choosing the canonical one.
supporting_evidence: Duplicate Charge RCA Playbook: Cross-Jurisdiction Double Tax pattern
Tax engine release notes for location-resolver v2 list this as a known edge case
Affected accounts all have origin_state != destination_state
recommended_action: Revert location-resolver to v1 or hotfix the jurisdiction-selection logic
Issue tax credit for the duplicate jurisdictional charges
Regulatory disclosure if required in the affected states
Add a jurisdiction-conflict test matrix covering 10 multi-state scenarios
